emails.subject: Re: Question re: Email retention policy
emails.body: Re: Question re: Email retention policy Sorry for the late reply. You are correct about the policy. Limor Nissan/ENRON@enronXgate 05/29/2001 01:01 PM

emails.subject: RE: Question re: Email retention policy
emails.body: RE: Question re: Email retention policy Thanks Richard, The reason I asked was because our IT people in Houston have told us that we cannot transfer emails that we need beyond the retention period to word documents. That seemed a bit strange, but they were quite emphatic. I have clarified the rule with our IT head. Thanks a lot, and take care, Limor Enron Global Markets 520 Madison Avenue New York, NY 10022 Tel: 212.715.5283 Fax: 212.715.5608 E-Mail: Limor.Nissan@Enron.com
